name: Messenger's Ring (Greater)
description:
This silver signet ring changes to match the insignia of a lord or organization you serve (or your own face, if you serve no one else). It grants you a +3 item bonus to Diplomacy checks and lets you cast as an arcane innate spell at will.

Activate—Dispatch Messenger 1 minute (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect The ring casts to your specification. The animal is a magical creature that springs from the ring, and its appearance suits the iconography or heraldry of the lord or organization represented by the ring.

Activate—Sending 3 command

Frequency once per hour

Effect The ring casts to your specifications.
